headline: SPX Technologies (SPXC) Soars 4.4%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: SPX Technologies (SPXC) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
